name: logistics supervisors at freight brokers managing 5-15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics supervisors at freight brokers processing 5-15 vehicles, missed inspections cause compliance penalties. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking of inspection schedules and compliance.
target_audience: logistics supervisors at freight brokers managing 5-15 vehicles
